l1.title: Apni identity verify karo
l1.aadhaarHint: 12 digits. Hum aapke Aadhaar-linked mobile par OTP bhejte hain (yeh aapke EaseCab number se alag ho sakta hai).
l1.note: Yeh confirm karne ke liye ki yeh aap hi ho, hum aapke Aadhaar-linked mobile par ek OTP bhejte hain.
l1.otpSentTo: Aapke Aadhaar-linked mobile par bheja gaya
l1.successBody: Ab duty post karna shuru karne ke liye apni profile poori karo.
l1.grantedTitle: Aap duty post karne ke liye taiyaar ho

fallback.title: Aadhaar-linked mobile nahi hai?
fallback.body: Aap manually verify karwa sakte ho — hamari team aapki details review karegi. (Jald available)

driver.title: Driver documents
driver.subtitle: Verified-driver badge paane ke liye apna licence aur vehicle add karo.
driver.dlSubtitle: Apna DL number aur date of birth verify karo.
driver.dlNote: Apne licence ki details bilkul waise hi daalo jaise chhapi hain. Hum inhe RTO database se verify karte hain.
driver.rcSubtitle: Apni vehicle ka registration number verify karo.
driver.rcNote: Apni vehicle ka registration number daalo. Hum VAHAN database se RC details laate hain.
driver.uploadRequired: Document ki clear photo add karo (zaroori)
driver.docTooBig: File 10 MB se kam honi chahiye
driver.docBadType: JPG, PNG, WebP ya PDF use karo
driver.badgePending: Submit kiya — verified-driver badge admin review ke baad milta hai.

errors.rateLimited: Bahut zyada attempts. Thodi der baad try karo.
errors.invalidOtp: Yeh code verify nahi hua. Check karke phir try karo.
errors.verifyFailed: Yeh details verify nahi huin. Check karke phir try karo.
errors.generic: Kuch galat ho gaya. Phir try karo.

timeline.title: Apni profile complete karein
timeline.postUnlocked: Posting unlock — Aadhaar + photo ho gaye
timeline.postPending: Aadhaar + profile photo posting unlock karte hain
timeline.photoHint: Posting unlock karne ke liye profile photo add karein.
timeline.contactSupport: Hamari support team se contact karein

detail.onlyYou: Yeh verified information sirf aap dekh sakte hain.
detail.privacyNote: Aapki privacy ke liye, EaseCab sirf aapka verified status aur last 4 digits rakhta hai — kabhi poora Aadhaar ya demographic details nahi.
detail.dlPrivacyNote: Aapka licence RTO database se verify kiya gaya. Hum sirf aapka verification status rakhte hain — licence number ya details nahi.
detail.rcPrivacyNote: Aapki RC VAHAN database se verify ki gayi. Hum sirf aapke vehicle ka make, model aur registration rakhte hain — owner, fuel ya doosre RC details nahi.

center.allDone: Sab kuch verified hai. Edit ya re-verify karne ke liye kisi bhi item par tap karein.
center.addPhotoNote: 100% tak pahunchne aur posting unlock karne ke liye profile photo add karein.
center.rejectedNote: Ek document reject hua — fix karke dobara submit karne ke liye us par tap karein.
